creator: kuma@nk.rim.or.jp
text:
I believe the following modifications make the current
	manpage better:

	1) adoping several types of 'mdoc'-base macros, .Bx, 
	   .Pq, .Sq, .An, and so on.

	2) removing unsuitable (I think, of cource) heading space
	   character in some lines.  It causes unexpected line breaking.

	3) spoofed -> spoofs (I am not clear because I am not a native
	   English speaker at all). 

	Please examine the following diff file

How-To-Repeat: 
	no need to specify?!
